creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jadawin
Date: Thu Feb  7 07:37:45 2013
New Revision: 311813
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311813

Log:
  This class provides methods for making parallel, asynchronous requests
  to the OpenStack API. This distribution comes with a command line tool
  stackattack which heavily uses this class.
  
  WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-OpenStack-Attack/
  
  PR:		ports/175914
  Submitted by:	Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>

Added:
  head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/
  head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/net/Makefile

Modified: head/net/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/Makefile	Thu Feb  7 07:08:33 2013	(r311812)
+++ head/net/Makefile	Thu Feb  7 07:37:45 2013	(r311813)
@@ -632,6 +632,7 @@
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-OpenID-Consumer
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-OpenSSH
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-OpenSSH-Parallel
+    SUBDIR += p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-Packet
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-Packet-Target
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-ParseWhois

Added: head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/Makefile	Thu Feb  7 07:37:45 2013	(r311813)
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	Net-OpenStack-Attack
+PORTVERSION=	1.0500
+CATEGORIES=	net perl5
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+
+MAINTAINER=	gslin@gslin.org
+COMMENT=	Tools for stress testing an OpenStack deployment
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Any-Moose>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Any-Moose \
+		p5-App-Rad>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-App-Rad \
+		p5-HTTP-Async>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTTP-Async \
+		p5-JSON>=0:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-JSON \
+		p5-Net-HTTPS-NB>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Net-HTTPS-NB \
+		p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
+
+PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
+
+MAN1=		stackattack.1
+MAN3=		Net::OpenStack::Attack.3
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/distinfo	Thu Feb  7 07:37:45 2013	(r311813)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (Net-OpenStack-Attack-1.0500.tar.gz) = 0f813b4b6b9d3636cd7929b48d6ac87f84816b667b22903a5b7d2d9cc44ac326
+SIZE (Net-OpenStack-Attack-1.0500.tar.gz) = 11183

Added: head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/pkg-descr	Thu Feb  7 07:37:45 2013	(r311813)
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+This class provides methods for making parallel, asynchronous requests
+to the OpenStack API. This distribution comes with a command line tool
+stackattack which heavily uses this class.
+
+WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-OpenStack-Attack/

Added: head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-OpenStack-Attack/pkg-plist	Thu Feb  7 07:37:45 2013	(r311813)
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+@comment $FreeBSD$
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net/OpenStack/Attack/.packlist
+%%SITE_PERL%%/Net/OpenStack/Attack.pm
+bin/stackattack
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Net/OpenStack
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Net
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net/OpenStack/Attack
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net/OpenStack
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net
